name: marketing-skills
description: 营销技能市场包：用于消费者洞察、产品概念、产品买点文案、江小白级情绪短文案、活动简报、内容规划和上市推广工作流。Marketing skills market package for consumer insight, product concepts, product benefit copywriting, Jiangxiaobai-style emotional copywriting, campaign briefs, content planning, and go-to-market workflows.

interface.description: 可复用的 Codex 营销工作流技能，覆盖消费者洞察、产品概念、产品买点文案、江小白级情绪短文案、活动简报和上市推广。Reusable marketing workflow skills for consumer insight, product concepts, product benefit copywriting, Jiangxiaobai-style emotional copywriting, campaign briefs, and go-to-market.
